name: banyuan
description: 会想，就会做 —— 一句话生成你的专属应用，动动嘴就能改，一键发布到各个平台，人人都能造出自己的数字武器。BanvasGL 自研 2D 引擎 + XiangDi AI Agent（SDD + Harness）+ Banyan 低代码平台。

scripts.build:banvasgl: pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvasgl build && pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvasgl-react build && pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvas-react-runtime build
scripts.build:libs: pnpm run build:banvasgl && pnpm run build:agent && pnpm run build:deploy
scripts.dev:banyan: pnpm run build:libs && concurrently --kill-others -c "magenta.bold,gray.bold,#ff9900.bold,#00cc99.bold,cyan.bold" -n canvas,agent,xiangdi-srv,knowledge-srv,banyan "pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvasgl dev" "pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvasgl-react dev" "pnpm --filter @banyuan/xiangdi-agent dev" "pnpm --filter xiangdi-server dev" "pnpm --filter knowledge-server dev" "pnpm --filter banyan dev"
scripts.dev:lunlunglass: pnpm run build:banvasgl && concurrently --kill-others -c "magenta.bold,cyan.bold,green.bold" -n canvas,lunlunglass,react "pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvasgl dev" "pnpm --filter lunlunglass dev" "pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvasgl-react dev"
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvasgl run lint && pnpm --filter @banyuan/xiangdi-agent run lint && pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvasgl-react run lint && pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvas-react-runtime run lint && pnpm --filter @banyuan/deploy-agent run lint && pnpm --filter ./apps/banyan/backend run lint && pnpm --filter ./apps/banyan/electron run lint && pnpm --filter ./apps/banyan/frontend run lint && pnpm --filter ./apps/knowledge-server run lint && pnpm --filter ./apps/xiangdi-server run lint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvasgl run lint:fix && pnpm --filter @banyuan/xiangdi-agent run lint:fix && pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvasgl-react run lint:fix && pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvas-react-runtime run lint:fix && pnpm --filter @banyuan/deploy-agent run lint:fix && pnpm --filter ./apps/banyan/backend run lint:fix && pnpm --filter ./apps/banyan/electron run lint:fix && pnpm --filter ./apps/banyan/frontend run lint:fix && pnpm --filter ./apps/knowledge-server run lint:fix && pnpm --filter ./apps/xiangdi-server run lint:fix
